resources.string: Finyelela abathengi futhi uthengise izinto zakho ku-Mochi. Izinkokhelo ziphathwa ngokuphepha nge-Stripe.
Dala iphrofayela yakho yomthengisi ukuze uqale ukufaka izinto
Xhuma i-akhawunti ye-Stripe ukuze wamukele izinkokhelo kubathengi
I-Mochi ithatha u-%1$s%% kukho konke ukuthengisa.

I-Stripe ikhokhisa imali yayo yokucubungula ngokwentengiselwano ngayinye kanye nemali engaguquki nge-chargeback ngayinye. Amanani amanje wemali yakho nesifunda sakho afakwe kwi-Dashboard yakho ye-Stripe.
Sizokwenyusa inzuzo yakho ngokuzenzakalelayo ngenani elincane elidingekayo ukuze uhlale phambili, kuze kufike kuleli nani eliphezulu.
Inani lokucathama eliphezulu kufanele okungenani libe inani lakho lokucathama
Inzuzo yakho ifakiwe kodwa idluliswe ngokushesha. Omunye umfaki-mali unenani eliphezulu kakhulu. Inzuzo yakhe manje ingu-%1$s.
Ukukhokha akukwazanga ukuqalwa — umthengisi kungenzeka angakaqedi ukusetha inkokhelo
Faka izwe lakho ukuze ubone izinketho zokuthumela
Choose which marketplace events send you notifications. Disabled topics are still recorded in your inbox.
Suspension, ban, and reactivation notices for your account.
Capability and payout changes on your connected Stripe account.
An auction you bid on has been cancelled.
An auction you bid on or watched has closed.
Another bidder has placed a higher bid than yours.
A new bid was placed on one of your auctions.
Decisions on listings you posted or appealed.
New messages from buyers or sellers in your threads.
Shipping, delivery, dispute, and refund updates on orders you placed.
New orders, dispute openings, and refund requests on items you sell.
Updates on reports you have filed.
Notices when a report names you as the target.
New reviews written about you by buyers or sellers.
Replies to reviews you have written.
Billing, pause, and cancellation events on subscriptions you bought.
Billing, pause, and cancellation events on subscriptions you sell.
Activate your account to start buying and selling.
Kufihliwe kuze kube umthengisi ekubuyekeza, noma ngemva kwezinsuku ezingu-14.
Siza abathengi besikhathi esizayo — yabelana ngokuthi le-oda lihambe kanjani.
Nikeza isizathu sesicelo sakho sokubuyiselwa imali.
Lokhu kuyokhansela ukubhalisela kwakho. Uzolahlekelwa ukufinyelela ekupheleni kwesikhathi sakho samanje sokukhokhisa.
Ukubhalisa kuyizinto ezithengwa njalo — abathengisi bazifaka ngamanani anyangazonke noma onyaka.
Ezinye izenzo, kufaka phakathi ukudala izinhlu ezintsha nokuqedela ama-oda, zivinjelwe ngenkathi i-akhawunti yakho ikulesi simo.
Asikho isiphequluli esitholakalayo sokuvula ikhasi lokukhokha
Xhuma i-akhawunti ye-Stripe ukuze uthole izinkokhelo kulolu hlu.
Zama ukulungisa noma ukususa izihlungi zakho.
Imali yenkundla: %1$s%%. Bona ideshibhodi yakho ye-Stripe ngezindleko zomcubunguli.
Amanani emali aphelele. Imakethe ihlunga ngemali yohlu uqobo.
Lo mthengisi uvinjelwe. Ama-oda amasha ngeke afakwe.
Lo mthengisi umisiwe okwesikhashana. Ama-oda amasha amisiwe kuze kube i-akhawunti ibuyiselwa.
Ukuthenga kukhutshaziwe ngenkathi i-akhawunti yomthengisi ikhawulelwe.
Lokhu kususa unyazi olubhaliwe ku-akhawunti yakho unomphela.
Thepha Uhlu olusha ukuze udale into yakho yokuqala.
Lapho uthumela umyalezo kumthengisi (noma umthengi ekuthumela umyalezo) ingxoxo izovela lapha.
Ibhange lakho lifake isicelo sokubuyiselwa kwemali ku-oda. I-Stripe iphethe impikiswano nomthengisi; umphumela uzovela lapha lapho usunqunyiwe.
Shiya kungenalutho ukuze ubuyisele i-oda eligcwele.
Abathengi nabathengisi bangabuyekezana emva kwe-oda eliqediwe.
Vula i-oda eliqediwe ukuze ushiye ukubuyekezwa.
Izimali zokucubungula ze-Stripe zikhonjiswa kudeshibhodi yakho ye-Stripe.
Ungaphendula kanye kuphela. Izimpendulo zibonwa ngumphakathi.
Ama-oda avela ezinhluweni zakho ezishicilelwe avela lapha.
Thepha isithonjana sebhukhmakhi kunoma yiluphi uhlu ukuze ululondoloze ukuze ulusebenzise kamuva.
Qedela ukungeniswa kwakho ku-Stripe ngaphambi kokuthi wamukele izinkokhelo.
Igcwalisa ngokuzenzakalelayo ezinkokhelweni ezizayo lapho kungezwa ukuhlanganiswa kokukhokha.
Isetshenziselwa ama-invoyisi nokuhambisana nentela. Ayiboniswa kuphrofayela yakho yomphakathi.
Xhuma i-Stripe ukuze uqale ukufaka izinto ohlwini nokuthola izinkokhelo.
Dala i-akhawunti yomthengisi ukuze ufake izinto ohlwini futhi ufinyelele abathengi.
Ezinye izilawuli ze-akhawunti yomthengisi zizovela lapha njengoba zitholakala.
Xhuma i-Stripe ngaphambi kokufaka izinto ohlwini.
Dala iphrofayela yakho yomthengisi ngaphambi kokuxhuma izinkokhelo.
Ukusetha kwakho komthengisi sekuphelele. Ungaphatha i-Stripe noma uhlole isimo sakamuva se-akhawunti yakho lapha.
Dala iphrofayela yakho yomthengisi ukuze uqale ukufaka izimpahla
Xhuma i-akhawunti ye-Stripe ukuze wamukele izinkokhelo kubathengi
I-Stripe idinga ulwazi olwengeziwe ngaphambi kokuba wamukele izinkokhelo. Qedela izimfuneko ku-Stripe Dashboard yakho, bese uchofoza i-Hlola isimo.
